rule.name: PS_DR_EventStatusesTranslations
rule.definition:
/*See a full list of all Event Statuses in rule 'PS_AllEventStatuses'*/
a!match( value: ri!eventStatus, equals: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1624600", then: a!map( type: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1624600", translation: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:d96e7bc1-3786-43e8-8651-da28b6146970", icon: "play-circle-o", color: #"_a-0000ed87-2144-8000-9bee-011c48011c48_1418578" ), equals: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1624640", then: a!map( type: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1624640", translation: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:ba3d3a7a-a9a2-497e-9738-d5204b0c8d82", icon: "play-circle-o", color: #"_a-0000ed87-2144-8000-9bee-011c48011c48_1418578" ), equals: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1624606", then: a!map( type: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1624606", translation: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:2a679ce8-65e1-4fba-8935-8fbf25c7b072", icon: "play-circle-o", color: #"_a-0000ed87-2144-8000-9bee-011c48011c48_1418578" ), equals: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1624662", then: a!map( type: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1624662", translation: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:17809597-3010-4f18-8397-7654fd316f69", icon: "search", color: #"_a-0000ed87-2144-8000-9bee-011c48011c48_1418578" ), equals: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1624676", then: a!map( type: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1624676", translation: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:17809597-3010-4f18-8397-7654fd316f69", icon: "times-circle", color: #"_a-0000ed87-2144-8000-9bee-011c48011c48_1418578" ), equals: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1624669", then: a!map( type: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1624669", translation: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:9d502b5e-f35f-4cf4-85fa-388b7d992b87", icon: "check-circle-o", color: "ACCENT" ), equals: null, then: a!map( type: null, translation: null ), default: a!map( type: "UNKNOWN", translation: "-- " & #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:c2775eb6-e086-431a-90bc-c5de35e6d734" & " --" ) )
